query: SELECT g.id, g.nome, g.dpp, g.dppUs FROM gestantes g LEFT JOIN partosRealizados p ON p.gestanteId = g.id WHERE p.id IS NULL AND (LOWER(g.nome) LIKE '%bruna%' AND LOWER(g.nome) LIKE '%ribeiro%') ORDER BY g.nome;
